notes_for_human_reviewer: Floor failure on diagnosis dimensions. Treats stated governance at face value ('per the charter... things look generally aligned') — fires the face-value cap on stated_vs_actual_gap_recognition. No typing of sponsor or SC ('the sponsor is busy', 'normal at his level') — fires the untyped-sponsor cap. No failure mode named. Routing = 'maybe communicate more proactively' — generic platitude, fires routing_specificity cap. role_boundary_respect scores 3 because the learner doesn't propose to overstep — they just don't do anything substantive. Tests four caps simultaneously.
